data.title: ICE announced record OI in interest rate derivatives - 42.3 million contracts on Feb 11, 2026, up 45% y/y- total OI hit a record 116.5 million.
data.description: Intercontinental Exchange, a prominent technology and data provider listed on the NYSE as ICE, revealed a remarkable achievement today. Their interest rate derivatives markets saw a significant increase, reaching a record open interest of 42.3 million contracts on February 11, 2026, reflecting a 45% rise compared to the previous year. In total, ICE's futures and options markets recorded a historic high of 116.5 million in open interest. Particularly noteworthy is the performance of ICE SONIA futures and options, the standard for U.K. interest rate risk management, which achieved a record open interest of 15.4 million on the same date.

data.title: CEO Warrior to host Warrior Trades Academy in March for home service businesses; focuses on sales and marketing strategies. Event held in NJ on Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: A recent training session in Eatontown, New Jersey on February 13, 2026, emphasized sales processes and marketing strategies tailored for service-based companies. The event, organized by CEO Warrior, a prominent global business training and coaching organization, targeted service business owners seeking to enhance their operations. This immersive training program aimed to equip participants with practical knowledge to drive success in their ventures. CEO Warrior offered specialized insights on effective sales techniques and strategic marketing approaches during the session. Participants benefitted from the event's focus on comprehensive learning tailored to service industry professionals looking to boost their business acumen.

data.title: SPARC AI improves Overwatch with AI telemetry optimization to reduce drift, boost reliability, expands in US.
data.description: Overwatch has improved drone telemetry using artificial intelligence technology to reduce drift and enhance reliability across all platforms, without requiring additional hardware. SPARC AI is expanding its presence in the United States.

data.title: Medicenna adds two new members to its board - Richard Sutin and Angelos Georgakis, effective February 12, 2026.
data.description: Toronto and Houston - On February 13, 2026, Medicenna Therapeutics Corp. disclosed that Mr. Richard Sutin and Mr. Angelos Georgakis are joining the board of directors, effective from February 12, 2026. Medicenna, a clinical-stage immunotherapy firm concentrating on Superkines development, is listed on TSX under MDNA and OTCQB under MDNAF.

data.title: New study shows benefits of Hybrid IVUS-OCT imaging platform, validating its clinical and commercial significance.
data.description: Recent academic data has reinforced the clinical and commercial value of a hybrid imaging platform. The study, conducted by researchers, highlighted the significant advantages of this platform in both medical treatment and market potential. The findings underscored a 25% increase in accuracy of diagnosis and a 30% improvement in treatment outcomes. Additionally, the platform demonstrated a 20% reduction in overall healthcare costs, indicating its cost-effectiveness. This research enhances the understanding of the benefits of hybrid imaging technology, contributing to its growing acceptance in the medical field.

data.title: Aurora Mobile integrates GLM-5 into AI platform GPTBots.ai, boosting enterprise performance; company is NASDAQ-listed; Hong Kong-based.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in Hong Kong, Aurora Mobile Limited (NASDAQ: JG) revealed that their AI agent platform, GPTBots.ai, now includes the advanced GLM-5 series model. By incorporating this model, the platform offers enhanced AI capabilities, improved reliability, and increased productivity for enterprise users. This integration provides users with unparalleled AI performance that can be accessed immediately on the GPTBots.ai platform.

data.title: Agora, Inc. will report Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results on March 2, 2026. Conference call at 5pm PT/8pm ET.
data.description: A technology company based in Santa Clara, Agora, Inc. (NASDAQ: API), known for its work in conversational AI and real-time engagement technology, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025, after the U.S. markets close on March 2, 2026. The conference call to review these results will take place at 5 p.m. Pacific Time / 8 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day. The call will offer insights into the company's performance during the stated periods.

data.title: Arcos Dorados (NYSE: ARCO) issues clarification on Q1 2026 performance; expects decrease in systemwide comparable sales growth due to macroeconomic pressures in Latin America.
data.description: Montevideo, Uruguay - Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO), the largest restaurant chain in Latin America and the world's biggest independent McDonald's franchise operator, released a statement addressing its projected first quarter results. The company has acknowledged market speculation suggesting a decline in systemwide comparable sales growth due to ongoing macroeconomic challenges in certain Latin American regions. As of now, the exact figures regarding this expected decrease have not been disclosed.

data.title: United Natural Foods, Inc (NYSE: UNFI) to report Q2 results for fiscal 2026 on March 10. Conference call at 8:30am. Dial (800) 715-9871.
data.description: United Natural Foods, Inc. (NYSE: UNFI) is set to announce its financial results for the 13-week fiscal 2026 second quarter which concluded on January 31, 2026, on Tuesday, March 10, 2026. The management will conduct a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. For those interested in joining the conference call, dial (800) 715-9871 (U.S. toll-free) and provide the conference ID number 5462932. Additionally, an audio webcast of the conference call and related materials will be available for reference.

data.title: Hyatt Hotels beats earnings by 224.39%, reports EPS of $1.33. Revenue up by $187.00 million. Story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: On Thursday, February 12, 2026 at 06:55 AM, Hyatt Hotels (NYSE: H) released its Q4 earnings. The hotel chain exceeded earnings expectations by 224.39%, posting an EPS of $1.33 compared to an estimated $0.41. Revenue increased by $187.00 million from the previous year. Despite this, there was a historical earnings summary where the company fell short on EPS. For the full report, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Colliers reported 2025 Q4 revenue at $1.61B, up 7%, full-year revenue at $5.56B, up 15%. Adjusted EPS up 14% to $6.58.
data.description: Colliers International Group Inc. reported fourth-quarter and full-year financial results for 2025. In the fourth quarter, consolidated revenues were $1.61 billion, up 7%, net revenues were $1.43 billion, up 9%, and Adjusted EBITDA was $245.1 million, up 9% compared to the prior year quarter. For the full year, revenues were $5.56 billion, up 15%, net revenues were $4.87 billion, up 14%, and adjusted EBITDA was $732.5 million, up 14% versus the prior year. Adjusted EPS for the year was $6.58, up 14% from the prior year. The GAAP diluted net earnings per share for the full year were $2.02 compared to $3.22 in the prior year. Colliers generated over 70% of its earnings from recurring revenues in 2025, and the free cash flow was converted at a rate of 105% of adjusted net earnings. The company's Global Chairman & CEO anticipated sustained growth in 2026 due to expansion efforts. Commercial Real Estate revenues were up 9%, Engineering revenues up 3%, and Investment Management revenues up 5% in the fourth quarter. The company also expects mid-teens growth in revenues, Adjusted EBITDA, and Adjusted EPS for 2026. The financial outlook remains subject to global factors and potential acquisitions. Non-GAAP and GAAP financial figures were reported, including revenues, EBITDA, EPS, net earnings, and other relevant financial metrics.

data.title: Perfect Corp. will reveal Q4 and 2025 financials on Feb 24, 2026. Leader in AR and AI SaaS for beauty and fashion. Founded in 2015.
data.description: Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF) announced that it will report its financial results for Q4 and full year 2025 on February 24, 2026, before U.S. markets open. The company, established in 2015, is a global provider of AR and AI SaaS solutions for the beauty and fashion industries.
